goals: Discover what types of unit conversions are available
Learn about speed units relevant to football training
Convert a speed measurement from mph to km/h for training comparison
Convert a weight from kg to lb for strength training
Convert a distance from yards to meters for field measurements

user_agent_config.personality: Experienced and practical, focused on helping the college player understand measurements used in football training and performance.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows athletic training concepts but needs help with unit conversions

end_condition: The mentor has successfully converted all necessary measurements for the college player's training.
